formula.value:
local function extractHuFromI2(s) local section = s:match("И2=%b{}") local hu = section and section:match("ху=([^}]+)") if not hu then return "" end hu = hu:gsub("%s+", "") return hu end
return extractHuFromI2("

default.name: ㅤ ㅤ ㅤ ㅤ ㅤ ㅤ ㅤ

formula.value:
local function extractHu(s) local section = s:match("И1=%{(.-)%},%s*И2") local hu = section and section:match("ху=([^}]+)") if not hu then return '' end hu = hu:gsub("%s+", "") -- убрать пробелы return hu end
return extractHu("{
